name: Square Ruffle Pillow - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Add a touch of charm to your space with the Square Ruffle Pillow from Bullseye's Playground™. This cute pillow features a delightful ruffle design and is made from a blend of durable materials, ensuring it lasts through many cozy moments. Perfect for your couch, bed, or favorite chair, it brings a playful yet stylish vibe to any room. Enjoy the comfort and whimsy this pillow adds to your home decor.
